command_events.command: cd /Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz100371/laundry-compensation && rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json && npm install 2>&1

echo "=== 1. 创建洗护订单 ===" && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3100/api/orders \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "x-actor-id: store-001-staff" \
  -d '{"storeId":"STORE-001","customerId":"CUST-100","customerName":"张三","receiptPhotos":["photo1.jpg","photo2.jpg"]}' | python3 -m json.tool

cd /Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz100371/laundry-compensation && ORDER_ID=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3100/api/orders -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-actor-id: store-001-staff" -d '{"storeId":"STORE-001","customerId":"CUST-100","customerName":"张三","receiptPhotos":["photo1.jpg","photo2.jpg"]}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['data']['id'])") && echo "ORDER_ID=$ORDER_ID" && echo "--- 添加瑕疵备注 ---" && curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3100/api/orders/$ORDER_ID/notes" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-actor-id: store-001-staff" -d "{\"orderId\":\"$ORDER_ID\",\"storeId\":\"STORE-001\",\"defectDescription\":\"领口有污渍\",\"defectPhotos\":[\"defect1.jpg\"],\"severity\":\"moderate\"}" | python3 -m json.tool && echo "--- 提交赔付申请(200元) ---" && CLAIM1_ID=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3100/api/claims -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-actor-id: store-001-staff" -d "{\"orderId\":\"$ORDER_ID\",\"storeId\":\"STORE-001\",\"amount\":200,\"reason\":\"洗后掉色\"}" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['data']['id'])") && echo "CLAIM1_ID=$CLAIM1_ID" && echo "--- 重复申请同一订单(300元，应合并) ---" && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3100/api/claims -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-actor-id: store-001-staff" -d "{\"orderId\":\"$ORDER_ID\",\"storeId\":\"STORE-001\",\"amount\":300,\"reason\":\"纽扣丢失\"}" | python3 -m json.tool && echo "--- 查看订单时间线 ---" && curl -s "http://localhost:3100/api/orders/$ORDER_ID/timeline" | python3 -m json.tool

cd /Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz100371/laundry-compensation && ORDER_ID=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3100/api/orders -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-actor-id: store-002-staff" -d '{"storeId":"STORE-002","customerId":"CUST-200","customerName":"李四","receiptPhotos":["r1.jpg"]}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['data']['id'])") && echo "--- 提交大额赔付(800元，需高级复核) ---" && CLAIM_ID=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3100/api/claims -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-actor-id: store-002-staff" -d "{\"orderId\":\"$ORDER_ID\",\"storeId\":\"STORE-002\",\"amount\":800,\"reason\":\"衣物损坏严重\"}" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin)['data']; print(d['id'])") && echo "CLAIM_ID=$CLAIM_ID" && echo "--- 非高级复核人尝试同意(应被拒) ---" && curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3100/api/claims/$CLAIM_ID/review" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-actor-id: reviewer-normal" -d '{"action":"approve","comment":"同意赔付","isSeniorReviewer":false}' | python3 -m json.tool && echo "--- 高级复核人同意 ---" && curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3100/api/claims/$CLAIM_ID/review" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-actor-id: reviewer-senior" -d '{"action":"approve","comment":"确认赔付","isSeniorReviewer":true}' | python3 -m json.tool && echo "--- 补充材料流程 ---" && ORDER2_ID=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3100/api/orders -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-actor-id: store-003" -d '{"storeId":"STORE-003","customerId":"CUST-300","customerName":"王五","receiptPhotos":["r2.jpg"]}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['data']['id'])") && CLAIM2_ID=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3100/api/claims -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-actor-id: store-003" -d "{\"orderId\":\"$ORDER2_ID\",\"storeId\":\"STORE-003\",\"amount\":100,\"reason\":\"缩水\"}" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['data']['id'])") && echo "--- 总部要求补充材料 ---" && curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3100/api/claims/$CLAIM2_ID/review" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-actor-id: hq-reviewer" -d '{"action":"request_supplement","comment":"请提供损坏照片"}' | python3 -m json.tool && echo "--- 门店一次性提交多张补充照片 ---" && curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3100/api/claims/$CLAIM2_ID/supplements" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-actor-id: store-003-manager" -d '{"photos":["sup1.jpg","sup2.jpg","sup3.jpg"],"description":"衣物损坏细节照片"}' | python3 -m json.tool

cd /Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz100371/laundry-compensation && ORDER_ID=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3100/api/orders -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-actor-id: store-004" -d '{"storeId":"STORE-004","customerId":"CUST-400","customerName":"赵六","receiptPhotos":["r3.jpg"]}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['data']['id'])") && echo "ORDER_ID=$ORDER_ID" && echo "--- 流转订单到已取走 ---" && curl -s -X PATCH "http://localhost:3100/api/orders/$ORDER_ID/status" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-actor-id: store-004" -d '{"status":"washing"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d['data']['status'])" && curl -s -X PATCH "http://localhost:3100/api/orders/$ORDER_ID/status" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-actor-id: store-004" -d '{"status":"done"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d['data']['status'])" && curl -s -X PATCH "http://localhost:3100/api/orders/$ORDER_ID/status" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-actor-id: store-004" -d '{"status":"picked_up"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d['data']['status'])" && echo "--- 尝试对已取走订单添加瑕疵备注(应被拒) ---" && curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3100/api/orders/$ORDER_ID/notes" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-actor-id: store-004" -d '{"orderId":"dummy","storeId":"STORE-004","defectDescription":"偷偷改备注","defectPhotos":["x.jpg"],"severity":"minor"}' | python3 -m json.tool && echo "--- 财务月度导出(CSV) ---" && curl -s "http://localhost:3100/api/exports/monthly?year=2026&month=6&format=csv"
